prompt: The cute cinnamon mascot talks directly to camera, mouth clearly opening and closing with natural articulation, eyes wide open and bright, presenting the glowing golden orb of light that pulses gently, magical sparkles swirl around. Slow push-in, grounded, no orbit.

The four symptom characters tremble and react scared — the foot zaps with little lightning, the battery flickers low, the toilet shivers, the bandage winces — while the dark liver looms behind them. Slow push-in, grounded, no orbit.

Glowing golden coconut-oil MCT droplets swirl around and wrap the cinnamon mascot, then stream into a glowing cell; the mascot talks to camera, mouth articulating, presenting the flow with a confident smile. Slow push-in, grounded, no orbit.
